title: KKC Trails and Tales
description:
A Vanilla+ style pack meant for exploring new things in 1.20.2.

Note: This pack was made for the Kingdom Crafters Community server and is designed for server use with a small number of players.
body:
## This is an exploration and building focused pack meant to spice up the world as you explore the new features added in 1.20. 
> This pack has been made with multiplayer in mind. Some features will be unavailable in single player.

---


### What does this pack offer?
 Mostly vanilla gameplay but with some overhauled core mechanics
 - Enchanting is fun again! 
    - No need to grind for ages to enchant your gear, XP costs are lowered!
    - Mobs drop over enchanted gear!
    - You can disenchant items for later.
    - Some enchantments can be combined higher than usual for some OP combos!
 - Make compact redstone circuits with the "Integrated circuits" mod!
 - Paths are useful! Path blocks give a speed boost now.
 - New structures to find and loot.
 - Elytras can be customized.
 - Trims can be applied to more items.
 - Bunches of more food and decoration blocks!
 - Build and sail working ships!*
 - Better than vanilla storage options! No more laggy storage areas!
    - Automate farms with Autocrafting and Copper Pipes!
 - More fossils and shards to dig up.
 - Seasons change! Build greenhouses to grow crops year-round!
 - Emeralds have been replaced with coins!
    - Set up shops and sell items to other players
 - 100+ music discs to find!

> * Note some items have been made uncraftable and are intended to be sold at an admin shop on a server

---
